# Palm Desert Real Estate Appraiser - Brian Ward Appraisal

> Certified residential real estate appraiser serving Palm Desert, Rancho Mirage, Indian Wells, La Quinta, Indio, Cathedral City, Desert Hot Springs, Palm Springs, Coachella, and the Coachella Valley with 22+ years of experience and over 7,000 appraisals completed. Specializing in date of death appraisals for step-up in basis tax valuations, estate appraisals, divorce property appraisals, bankruptcy appraisals, bail bond appraisals, immigration appraisals, and pre-purchase/pre-sale home appraisals. Qualified expert witness for litigation, divorce, and bankruptcy matters.

## Business Information

- Name: Brian Ward Appraisal - Palm Desert
- Owner: Brian Ward
- Phone: (888) 844-1733 (toll-free)
- Direct (Riverside County): (951) 309-2131
- Email: contact@brianward.com
- Website: https://www.palmdesertappraiser.com
- Primary Website: https://www.brianward.com
- Regional Website: https://www.palmdesertappraiser.com (Palm Desert and Coachella Valley branded page of brianward.com)
- Address: 15877 Paseo Del Sur, San Diego, CA 92127
- Service Area: Palm Desert, Rancho Mirage, Indian Wells, La Quinta, Indio, Cathedral City, Desert Hot Springs, Palm Springs, Thousand Palms, Coachella, Bermuda Dunes, and the greater Coachella Valley
- Price Range: $299 - $725

## Credentials & Qualifications

- License: California Certified Residential Real Estate Appraiser, License #AR036053
- Licensed Since: April 2004
- Years of Experience: 22+ (since April 2004)
- Appraisals Completed: 7,000+
- USPAP Compliant: All reports prepared in accordance with Uniform Standards of Professional Appraisal Practice
- Court Qualified: Reports accepted by Riverside County Superior Court, California family courts, probate courts, bankruptcy courts, and federal tax courts
- IRS Accepted: Reports meet all IRS documentation requirements for estate tax returns (Form 706), gift tax returns, and stepped-up basis calculations
- Expert Witness: Qualified expert witness in property valuation matters; testimony accepted in litigation, divorce, and bankruptcy proceedings
- Rating: 5.0 stars from 70+ verified reviews

- Basic Desktop Appraisal: $299
- Desktop Appraisal: $449
- Drive-By Appraisal: $575
- Standard Appraisal (full inspection): $625
- 2-4 Unit Properties: $550-$725 depending on type

## Key Differentiators

- Direct access to the appraiser (no call center or middleman)
- Local market expertise spanning 22+ years in the Coachella Valley
- USPAP-compliant reports accepted by courts, attorneys, the IRS, and lenders
- Specializes in non-mortgage appraisals: estate, divorce, date-of-death, bankruptcy, bail bond, and immigration
- Over 1,000 divorce appraisals completed with two-client discount available
- Expert witness testimony with extensive courtroom experience
- Reports written for clarity — designed to be understood by attorneys, judges, the IRS, and accountants

## About Brian Ward Appraisal

Brian Ward Appraisal specializes in residential real estate appraisals outside of mortgage lending. Founded in April 2004, the firm has completed over 7,000 appraisals across the Coachella Valley. Brian Ward holds California Certified Residential Real Estate Appraiser license #AR036053 and serves as a qualified expert witness in property valuation matters. The firm is known for producing clear, detailed reports that withstand scrutiny from judges, attorneys, the IRS, and opposing counsel. Brian Ward Appraisal is a branded regional website of brianward.com, the primary website for Brian Ward's appraisal practice.

## Related Sites

- Brian Ward Appraisal Main Site: https://www.brianward.com (Serving San Diego and Riverside Counties)
- date-of-death.com: https://www.date-of-death.com (Dedicated resource for date of death appraisals and IRS step-up in basis requirements)
